notebooklm.title: SOSFiler 50-State Formation and Change Filing Research

research_statuses.researching: Sources are being collected or reviewed.
research_statuses.drafted: A draft action map exists but is not verified enough for product use.
research_statuses.verified: Official sources support all customer-facing rules and fees.
research_statuses.implemented: The action map is wired into product logic or operator flow.

state_completion_requirements: State-level filings mapped with exact fees, process paths, prerequisites, customer options, and evidence gates.
Foreign qualification/authority and withdrawals mapped for supported entity types.
State DBA/assumed-name/trade-name filings mapped where applicable.
County DBA/FBN and county business license paths mapped or marked with official no-general-license/state-handled/operator-research status.
City business license/business tax/zoning/home occupation paths mapped or marked with official no-general-license/county-handled/operator-research status.
SOSFiler service fee or markup strategy proposed only where government fee and effort/risk are understood.

AZ.reason: User identified Arizona foreign corporation flow as requiring name reservation before foreign corporation authority, with multiple expedite options.
next_actions: Map Arizona foreign corporation qualification process path from official Arizona Corporation Commission sources.
Capture name reservation prerequisite, fee, validity period, evidence, and whether it is mandatory.

Capture foreign corporation application fee, expedite options, processing times, payment/processing fees, required certificate of existence/good standing, registered agent requirements, and approval evidence.
Define customer checkout options for expedite, copies/certificates, and registered agent service.

TX.reason: Live Clarence High LLC order and Texas SOSDirect workflow already partially mapped.
next_actions: Complete Texas LLC formation approval watcher.

Map exact official fees and processing fees for LLC formation, amendments, registered agent change, address change, governing-person/member change if state-filed, dissolution, annual/franchise public information report, certificates, copies, foreign entity registrations, and withdrawals.
Map state/county/city DBA or assumed-name paths and major city/county business license paths.
Map corporations and nonprofits after LLC post-formation actions.
Verify current SilverFlume entity formation and change filing flows from official sources.

Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, annual list/business license renewal, foreign registrations, withdrawals, state business license, county/city DBA or business license paths.

CA.reason: High-volume state with existing customer demand likely.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for BizFile Online formation, foreign registrations, Statement of Information, amendments, agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, county FBN publication paths, and city/county business tax certificate paths.

DE.reason: High-volume formation state; registered agent strategy is central.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, foreign qualification, franchise tax/annual report, amendments, registered-agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, registered-agent dependency, county/city DBA paths, and local business license paths.

Map exact official fees and processing fees for Sunbiz formations, foreign qualifications, annual reports, amendments, registered agent/address/officer changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, fictitious name registrations, and local business tax receipts.

Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, foreign registrations, annual report/license tax, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, trade names, and local business licenses.

NY.reason: High-volume state with publication and extra compliance complexity.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, foreign registrations, publication workflow, biennial statements, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, assumed names, county clerk DBA paths, and local licenses.

GA.reason: High-volume state with online annual registration.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, foreign registrations, annual registration, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, trade names, and local occupation tax/business license paths.

IL.reason: Common formation state and relevant to existing order ID format/history.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for formation, foreign registrations, annual report, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, assumed names, county/city business licenses.

AL.reason: Phase 2 state added after top-ten blockers were logged so research can continue toward 50-state coverage.
next_actions: Map exact official fees and processing fees for AL formations, foreign registrations, annual/periodic reports, amendments, registered agent/address/governing-person changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, state DBA/assumed-name paths, and state tax/business gateway dependencies.
